name: Lentil Soup (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 1 red potato, peeled and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep soup pot, saut the shallots and onions in heated oil.
2. Add water and lentils and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, adding more water if needed to keep the three-cup level of liquid.
4. Cook lentils until barely tender.
5. Add all other vegetables and seasonings.
6. Continue cooking at least 20 minutes longer.
7. Fork-mash or puree mixture.
8. Serve warm, garnished with croutons or chives.
